final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' LIMIT 1));
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 2 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 2, "action": "query"}

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons (national layer) to be reduced by municipality

3.description: reduce storm-flood polygons to Kristiansand extent (intersect)

4.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

5.description: find nearest storm-flood polygon for each building (reduced set)

9.description: get county polygons to find county for Kristiansand
